节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provide a data representation to the system instead of providing a complete data object directly. When the user releases the drag over the target application, the system will use this data representation to request the actual data from drag source. This approach significantly improves the efficiency of initiating drag operations for large volumes of data and enhances the effectiveness of data reception. It is recommended to use this instead of the data field.
